rows.query: approximately three-quarters of total completed cases involving with multiple charges resulted in a guilty outcome.
those with lifetime suicidal thoughts had more than three times the odds, compared with those who never had suicidal thoughts.
rows.code:
rows = find_rows("self-reported-physician-diagnosed mood and/or anxiety disorder(s) > yes", "drug use > yes")
result = cell(rows.iloc[0], "fold-change")
print(result)

rows.query: the unemployment rate of arab women was 10.7 percentage points higher than that of women who did not belong to a visible minority group.
rows.code:
arab = cell("arab", "total")
not_visible = cell("not a visible minority", "total")
result = arab - not_visible
print(result)

rows.query: miami gardens in florida is one of the largest u.s. cities with an african american population.
the largest increases in csi were recorded in the cmas of greater sudbury , moncton , guelph , and kitchener-cambridge-waterloo.
rows.code:
cmas = ["greater sudbury", "moncton", "guelph", "kitchener-cambridge-waterloo"]
cols = find_col("percent change in crime severity index from 2017 to 2018")

values = colnum(cols)[df.row_header.isin(cmas)].astype(float)

max_value = values.max()

result = df.loc[values.idxmax(), "row_header"]

print(result)

rows.query: for females found guilty in ipv cases, probation was more often considered.
rows.code:
ipv_probation = cell("intimate partner violence (ipv) cases", "probation")
ipv_custody = cell("intimate partner violence (ipv) cases", "custody")

if ipv_probation > ipv_custody:
    result = "True"
else:
    result = "False"
    
print(result)

rows.query: between 2000 and 2010,the percentage of immigrants intending to settle in saskatchewan rose from less than 0.8% to 2.7%.
rows.code:
Sask = find_col("saskatchewan")
 result = cell("percent > saskatchewan", "2010") - cell("percent > saskatchewan", "2000")
 print(result)
